import{Document,Paragraph,TextRun,HeadingLevel,Packer}from'docx';export const generateDoc=async function(type){let data=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};// Accept a larger data object with optional fields to fill templates
const{userName,relationship,state,deceasedName,accountNumber,branchName,policyNumber,UAN,dematAccountNo,IFSC,bankName}=data;const date=new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-IN',{year:'numeric',month:'long',day:'numeric'});let title='Claim Letter';let lines=[];if(type==='sbi'){title='SBI Account Closure Application';lines=['To,','The Branch Manager,','State Bank of India,',branchName||'[Branch Name/Address]','',"Date: ".concat(date),'',"Subject: Application for Closure of Account Without Nominee (Under \u20B95,00,000)",'','Respected Sir / Madam,','',"I, ".concat(userName,", am the ").concat(relationship," of the late ").concat(deceasedName||'[Deceased Name]'," who held a savings account ").concat(accountNumber||'[Account Number]'," at your branch."),"The account holder passed away on ".concat(date/* placeholder for death date - replace if needed */,", and unfortunately, there is no nominee registered in the account. The total balance is under \u20B95,00,000/-."),'','As an eligible legal heir, I request you to process the claim and release the balance amount using the simplified indemnity bond procedure, as per RBI master directions.','','I am enclosing the following documents:','1. Original Death Certificate and 3 attested copies','2. Passbook / ATM Card of the deceased','3. My KYC Documents (Aadhaar & PAN)','4. Indemnity Bond on appropriate stamp paper','','Please transfer the balance to my account details below:',"Account Name: ".concat(userName||'[Your Name as per Bank]'," ,"),"Account Number: ".concat(accountNumber||'[Your Account Number]'),"IFSC Code: ".concat(IFSC||'[Your Bank IFSC]'),"Bank Name: ".concat(bankName||'[Your Bank Name]'),'','I kindly request you to acknowledge receipt and process this claim at your earliest convenience.','','Thanking you,','','Yours faithfully,','','(Signature)',userName,'[Your Contact Number]',"[Your Address in ".concat(state||'[State]',"]")];}else if(type==='lic'){title='LIC Policy Death Claim';lines=['To,','The Branch Manager,','Life Insurance Corporation of India,',branchName||'[Branch Name/Address]','',"Date: ".concat(date),'',"Subject: Death Claim intimation for Policy Number: ".concat(policyNumber||'[Policy Number]'),'','Respected Sir / Madam,','',"I, ".concat(userName,", am the ").concat(relationship," of the policyholder late ").concat(deceasedName||'[Deceased Name]',"."),"I am writing to intimate the death claim for the above-mentioned policy.",'','Enclosed are the necessary documents: Form 3783, original policy bond, death certificate, and my NEFT mandate.','','Please process the claim within the stipulated time.','','Yours faithfully,','','(Signature)',userName];}else if(type==='epf'){title='EPF Pension Claim Form 10D Cover Letter';lines=['To,','The Regional PF Commissioner,','Employees\' Provident Fund Organisation,','[Regional Office Address]','',"Date: ".concat(date),'',"Subject: Submission of Form 10D for Monthly Pension Claim",'','Respected Sir / Madam,','',"I, ".concat(userName,", am submitting this as the ").concat(relationship," of late ").concat(deceasedName||'[Deceased Name]'," (UAN: ").concat(UAN||'[UAN Number]',")."),"Please find enclosed the Form 10D along with the death certificate and other required proofs for commencing the monthly family pension.",'','Yours faithfully,','','(Signature)',userName];}else{lines=["Generic letter for ".concat(userName," (").concat(relationship," from ").concat(state,")")];}if(type==='account_closure'){title='Bank Account Closure Request';lines=['To,','The Branch Manager,',bankName||'[Bank Name & Branch Address]','',"Date: ".concat(date),'','Subject: Request for closure of bank account and transfer of balance','','Respected Sir / Madam,','',"I, ".concat(userName,", hereby request the closure of account number ").concat(accountNumber||'[Account Number]'," held in the name of the late ").concat(deceasedName||'[Deceased Name]',". I am the ").concat(relationship," and enclose the required documents for verification."),'','Please transfer the remaining balance to the following account:',"Account Name: ".concat(userName||'[Your Name]'),"Account Number: ".concat(accountNumber||'[Your Account Number]'),"IFSC: ".concat(IFSC||'[IFSC CODE]'),'','Enclosures:','- Death Certificate (original + attested copies)','- Proof of relationship','- KYC of claimant','','Yours faithfully,','','(Signature)',userName];}if(type==='transmission'){title='Demat Transmission Request';lines=['To,','The Depository Participant / Broker,','[DP Name & Address]','',"Date: ".concat(date),'','Subject: Transmission of securities on account of death of the holder','','Respected Sir / Madam,','',"I, ".concat(userName,", am the ").concat(relationship," of the deceased ").concat(deceasedName||'[Deceased Name]',", holding Demat Account No: ").concat(dematAccountNo||'[Demat Account No]',". I request transmission of the securities to the legal heir\u2019s demat account as per the attached documents."),'','Enclosed Documents:','- Death Certificate (original + attested copies)','- Legal Heir Certificate / Succession Certificate (if applicable)','- KYC of claimant','- Copy of account statements','','Please confirm receipt and advise the next steps.','','Yours faithfully,','','(Signature)',userName];}const doc=new Document({sections:[{properties:{},children:[new Paragraph({text:title,heading:HeadingLevel.HEADING_1,style:'Title'}),new Paragraph({children:[new TextRun({text:"Generated by Sahara · Replace all [ ] before printing",italics:true,color:"8A9E9E",size:18})],spacing:{after:200}}),...lines.map(line=>{if(line==='')return new Paragraph({text:'',spacing:{after:160}});return new Paragraph({children:[new TextRun({text:line,font:"Calibri",size:22})],spacing:{after:60}});})]}]});const blob=await Packer.toBlob(doc);const url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);const a=document.createElement('a');a.href=url;a.download="".concat(type.toUpperCase(),"_Claim_Letter_Sahara.docx");a.click();URL.revokeObjectURL(url);};
